name: J. Michael Luttig
summary: Retired federal judge and conservative legal authority who endorsed Kamala Harris, calling Trump 'unfit to serve' and warning he poses an existential threat to American democracy. Luttig, considered one of the most respected conservative jurists, played a crucial role advising Mike Pence that he could not overturn the 2020 election results.

keyStatements.quote: Donald Trump is manifestly unfit to be president of the United States.
A stake was driven through the heart of American democracy on January 6, 2021, and our democracy today is on a knife's edge.
Trump and his allies and supporters are a clear and present danger to American democracy.

background: J. Michael Luttig served on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit from 1991 to 2006, appointed by President George H.W. Bush at age 37. He is considered one of the most influential conservative jurists of his generation and was on short lists for Supreme Court nominations. Before his judgeship, he served in the Justice Department under Presidents Reagan and Bush. After leaving the bench, he served as General Counsel for Boeing. Luttig has been a leading conservative voice on constitutional law and was considered a mentor to many prominent conservative lawyers, including two current Supreme Court justices.
oppositionReasons: Believes Trump is fundamentally unfit to serve as president
Holds Trump responsible for January 6 insurrection and ongoing threats to democracy
Concerned Trump poses existential threat to American constitutional order
Worried about Trump's contempt for rule of law and democratic norms
Believes Trump's claims about 2020 election are unconstitutional and dangerous
notableActions: Endorsed Kamala Harris in 2024 - unprecedented for conservative legal icon
Advised Vice President Pence that he had no authority to overturn 2020 election
Testified before January 6 Committee about constitutional dangers
Publicly stated Trump is 'clear and present danger' to democracy
Co-authored statements with other conservative lawyers opposing Trump
Called Trump 'manifestly unfit' to be president
credibility: Judge Luttig is widely regarded as one of the most respected conservative legal minds in America. His opinions influenced Supreme Court jurisprudence, and he mentored numerous prominent conservative lawyers. His endorsement of a Democratic candidate and stark warnings about Trump carry immense weight in legal and conservative circles, particularly given his impeccable conservative credentials and lifetime of service to Republican administrations.
